rulings.Case Title: RAYMOND ALLEN et al VS. ALLIED PACKING et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, AUGUST 9, 2007, LINE 3. DEFENDANT RAYTHEON COMPANY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF FAILED TO SHIFT BURDEN OF PROOF. CONSTRUING THE EVIDENCE AND THE INFERENCES THEREFROM IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF, SEVERAL OF THE DEFENDANT'S MATERIAL FACTS ARE DISPUTED: 6, 7, 8, 17, 22, 25, 27, 28, 37, AND 40. DEFENDANT HAS NOT SHOWN THAT PLAINTIFF WAS ABLE TO IDENTIFY "MANUFACTURERS OF NUMEROUS VACUUM TUBES" AS STATED IN THE REPLY TO SEVEN. DEFENDANT HAS NOT DEMONSTRATED THAT THE TUBES TESTED BY COHEN WERE IDENTICAL TO THE ONES USED BY OR AROUND PLAINTIFF. IF DEFENDANT WISHED THE COURT TO TAKE JUDICIAL NOTICE OF GENERAL ORDER 129 INTERROGATORIES, IT SHOULD MAKE THAT REQUEST IN THE MOVING PAPERS. =(302/PJM/KD)

rulings.Case Title: JIM BATTS JR VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS B/P AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, AUGUST 9, 2007, LINE 4. DEFENDANT GORMAN-RUPP COMPANY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. FAILURE TO SHIFT BURDEN OF PROOF. DEFENDANT RELIES ONLY ON PLAINTIFF'S DEPOSITION TESTIMONY BUT THE TESTIMONY RELIED UPON CONTAINS ONLY A SINGLE REFERENCE TO GORMAN AND FACT THREE IS NOT SUPPORTED BY THE CITED EVIDENCE. PLAINTIFF'S DISCOVERY IS NOT DEFICIENT WITHIN THE MEANING OF MCCONNELL V KAISER GYPSUM (2001) 98 CAL. APP. 4TH 1098 AND WEBER V JOHN CRANE (2006) 143 CAL. APP. 4TH 1433. DEFENDANT'S REQUEST TO CONTINUE IS DENIED. THE REQUEST IS NOT AUTHORIZED BY C.C.P. SECTION 437 C (H); EVEN IF IT WERE, NO GOOD CAUSE HAS BEEN SHOWN. =(302/PJM)

rulings.Case Title: TROY W LEDO et al VS. THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BY AND et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Respondent The City And County Of San Francisco'S Demurrer To Petitioners' Petition For Issuance Of A Writ Of Administrative Mandate
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, AUGUST 9, 2007, LINE 15. RESPONDENT THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO PETITIONER'S PETITION FOR ISSUANCE OF ADMINISTRATIVE MANDAMUS IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND WITHIN TEN DAYS TO DETERMINE WHETHER MR. LEDO WILL SIGN THE PETITION. AS TO THE ISSUANCE OF THE EXHAUSTION OF ADMINISTRATIVE REMEDIES, IT APPEARS THAT THERE ARE FACTUAL ISSUES CONCERNING SERVICE AND THE COURT IS UNABLE TO DETERMINE IF THE PERSON COMPLETING EXHIBIT I IS A REGISTERED PROCESS SERVER ENTITLED TO THE PRESUMPTION IN E.C. SECTION 647. AS A CONSEQUENCE, THIS IS NOT A BASIS FOR DEMURRER. THE DECISION IN ANDERSON V CITY OF LA MESA (1981) 118 CAL. APP. 3RD 657 PROVIDES A BASIS FOR PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IF PLAINTIFF HAS OR NEED NOT HAVE EXHAUSTED ADMINISTRATIVE REMEDIES. =(302/PJM)
